name: Smart City International School - Assiut
description: A modern international school in Assiut offering a global curriculum with state-of-the-art facilities and a focus on technology.

name: Franciscan School Assiut
description: A historic school founded by Franciscan missionaries, providing quality education rooted in values and academic rigor.

name: Ahmed Deif Allah International School for Applied Technology
description: An applied technology-focused international school in Assiut, bridging academic learning with practical, hands-on skills.

name: Al-Salam Language School (SLS)
description: Al-Salam Language School is known for its bilingual program and nurturing environment for students from KG through high school.

name: Nile Egyptian School (NES) - Asyut
description: Part of the nationally recognized NES network, offering a world-class education that prepares students for Egyptian and international universities.

name: Assiut STEM School
description: A specialized STEM school in Assiut developing Egypt's next generation of scientists, engineers, and innovators through project-based learning.

name: American Egyptian Academy
description: The American Egyptian Academy provides a US-standard curriculum combining American educational values with Egyptian cultural pride.

name: College des Frères - Assiut
description: A French-inspired boys' school with a legacy of academic excellence, spiritual formation, and service to the community.

name: Al-Salam Modern School
description: Al-Salam Modern School offers a contemporary take on the national curriculum with enriched arts, sports, and language activities.

name: Tala'ea Al-Mustaqbal Language School
description: Tala'ea Al-Mustaqbal prepares future-ready students through a rich language program and a commitment to holistic education.
